name: Jerusalem Artichokes and Padron Pepper
steps: Soak the Jerusalem Artichoke for 10 minutes, and then wash it thoroughly.
Cut the Jerusalem artichoke in half or quarter if big.
Mix it in a bowl with a bit of salt, crushed garlic and rough ginger.
Drizzle the Jerusalem artichoke with honey to glaze.
Roast in the oven at 195C for 15 minutes and above until golden and cooked.
When golden, deglaze with soy sauce just to give it some taste and a dash of Chingkiang vinegar.
